testcases.description: Verify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01Offline StepsUI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal. kitaboo.com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.description: Verify if user ia able to create math activity
testcases.expected: Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen
testcases.raw: TC_02Offline Steps FunctionalityVerify if user ia able to create math activity 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to start authoring
testcases.expected: Click on start authoringShould redirect to New Activity creation page
testcases.raw: TC_03Offline Steps FunctionalityVerify if user is able to start authoring 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info 5. Click on start authoringShould redirect to New Activity creation page

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to add offline step
testcases.expected: Add Offline step User Should able add offline step
testcases.raw: TC_04Offline Steps FunctionalityVerify if user is able to add offline step 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Offline step User Should able add offline step

testcases.description: Verify if user able to enter the step title
testcases.expected: Enter the Step TitleUser Should able to Enter Data in Step Title
